input_args: Visit Paris (2 days), London (3 days), Amsterdam (2 days) in 7 days total. Flights: Paris-London, London-Amsterdam, Amsterdam-Paris. Must be in Paris between day 1-3.
extract_constraints.expected_output: Cities: Paris, London, Amsterdam. Durations: Paris 2d, London 3d, Amsterdam 2d. Total: 7 days. Flights: Paris-London, London-Amsterdam, Amsterdam-Paris. Constraint: Paris day 1-3.

input_args: Visit Paris, London, Amsterdam. 7 days total.
Paris 2d, London 3d, Amsterdam 2d. Flights: Paris-London, London-Amsterdam, Amsterdam-Paris. Paris day 1-3.
solve_problem.expected_output: Day 1-2: Paris. Day 3: Fly Paris to London. Day 3-5: London. Day 6: Fly London to Amsterdam. Day 6-7: Amsterdam.

input_args: Day 1-2 Paris. Day 3 fly to London. Day 3-5 London. Day 6 fly to Amsterdam. Day 6-7 Amsterdam.
format_answer.expected_output:
Here is the trip plan for visiting the 3 European cities for 7 days:
**Day 1-2:** Visit Paris for 2 days.
**Day 3:** Fly from Paris to London.
**Day 3-5:** Visit London for 3 days.
**Day 6:** Fly from London to Amsterdam.
**Day 6-7:** Visit Amsterdam for 2 days.

input_args: Visit Paris (2 days), London (3 days) in 5 days. Flights: Paris-London, London-Paris.
